caption: The video shows a sequence of frames from a trading software interface, specifically Orbis Pro Trader, displaying a one-minute chart for the stock INTC on November 22, 2013. The chart features candlestick patterns indicating price movements over time, with a horizontal line marking a significant level around $24.512. The cursor is positioned near this line, highlighting a specific point on the chart. The time displayed in the top right corner of the screen changes from 13:16:34 to 13:16:33, suggesting a slight rewind or pause in the video. The volume bars at the bottom of the chart show trading activity, with red and green bars representing sell and buy volumes, respectively. The overall scene suggests an analysis of trading patterns and potential entry or exit points for traders.
